title: Warning chemo & septic tanks
body: I saw a tiktok video that said chemo eats through the septic tank n possibly can damage the field too. Husband n I googled it,  and it's very true.  Repair or replacement can be btwn $10k - $20k. We called the company that pumped our septic. They are coming out this week and will come back out after my last chemo next week.  It's a big deal,  which I didn't know.
